title: Farmhouse Decorations
description: Farmhouse Decorations is all about old furniture perfect for house on the farm.
body:
# Farmhouse Decorations

Bring warmth, charm, and a touch of countryside life into your Minecraft world.

---

FDM is all about classic, rustic furniture inspired by farmhouse interiors - perfect for creating cozy houses, countryside cottages, or fully detailed survival bases. Instead of empty rooms, you get spaces that actually feel like someone lives there.

---

Take a look at some of the elements:

![fdm](https://cookiecraftmods.com/images/mod-gallery/fdm1.png)

---

### What makes it special:
- Rustic, farmhouse-style furniture with a warm aesthetic
- Perfect for kitchens, bedrooms, living rooms, and workshops
- Decorative elements like clocks, instruments, and storage props
- Cozy vibe that fits survival and roleplay worlds

---

**Is there anything you would like to see added to this mod? Or maybe you have found a bug? Join our discord and get into our community!**
[discord](https://discord.gg/YqFxSDJkPJ)

**For more specific info or to check on upcoming updates check out our website at:**
[https://cookiecraftmods.com](https://cookiecraftmods.com/)
